name: creative_identity
description: Persistent creative writing identity — mechanical style baseline, narrative principles (DNA), and per-project creative context (lore, characters, continuity). Learns from feedback and writing samples over time.
standalone_features: Ingest writing samples and compute mechanical style metrics
Track weighted narrative principles (creative DNA) by category
Store per-project creative context — characters, lore, scenes, decisions, threads
Post-session capture for creative work continuity
Style mode flag: learned, exploratory, or raw
Drift detection against your mechanical baseline
Full creative profile export for prompt injection

features: Link creative context entries to SoY projects
Show creative context on project pages
enhancements.description: Creative context entries and sessions link to projects, providing a creative layer on top of project management.
Notes can be ingested as writing samples for baseline analysis. Creative observations cross-reference with the notes module.
